# DFY Content

> Done-for-you short-form video service. We clone our clients' face and voice with AI, write every script, produce every cut, and publish to every platform — so they spend ~2 hours with us once and never film again.

Website: https://dfycontent.io
Email: hello@dfycontent.io

## What we do

DFY Content is a service business (not a SaaS tool). Clients spend a one-time ~2-hour studio session being captured (face + voice). After that, our team handles strategy, scripting, AI-clone production, editing, and publishing across platforms (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, LinkedIn, X). Clients approve every script and every cut before it goes live.

## How we differ from tools like HeyGen, Synthesia, Captions

Those are tools you operate yourself. We are a service that uses similar underlying tech (ElevenLabs voice cloning, image gen, animation models) but bundles the operation: human scriptwriters, editors, posting, ongoing strategy. Replaces a 4-person content team for the cost of one part of one.

## Pricing

Three tiers:
- Starter: $2,000–$5,000/month (1 platform, ~20 pieces/mo)
- Pro: $5,000–$10,000/month (2-3 platforms, 30+ pieces/mo) — most popular
- Premium: $10,000–$20,000+/month (all major platforms, white-glove)

Floor: $2,000/month. No service under $2k — production costs exceed margin.
Minimum contract term: 3 months. Month-to-month thereafter.

## Process timeline

14 days from contract signing to first post live:
- Day 0: 30-min kickoff call
- Day 2: 1-2 hour studio capture session
- Day 3-7: AI clone built, initial scripts drafted
- Day 8-12: Production
- Day 13-14: Client approval and publishing

After day 14: weekly cadence. Client spends ~30 minutes/week reviewing and approving.

## Tech stack (production)

- Voice: ElevenLabs v2 multilingual (dedicated Pro account per client)
- Image generation: Gemini / Nanobanana Pro
- Animation: Creatify Aurora
- Editing: ffmpeg pipelines
- Application stack: Next.js, Supabase, Inngest

## Key facts

- 30+ pieces of content per month per client (Pro tier)
- 2 hours of client time investment, one-time, ever
- 14-day onboarding to first live post
- Scripts written by human writers (not AI)
- Clients own their face, voice, and content — clone is portable if they cancel
- Service started in 2026

## Pages

- /how-it-works — full process breakdown
- /pricing — all three tiers and what's included
- /faq — 30 common questions answered
- /about — founder story, team, manifesto
- /apply — 60-second qualifier to start
- /vs/heygen, /vs/synthesia, /vs/captions — tool comparisons
- /for/saas-founders, /for/coaches, /for/agency-owners — industry pages

## What we are NOT

- Not a SaaS tool. We're a service.
- Not a deepfake operation. Every piece is consented, scripted, and approved by the client.
- Not the cheapest option. Floor is $2k/mo.
- Not a follower-count guarantee. We promise output cadence, not growth numbers.
